name: ascii-canvas
description: A production-grade ASCII diagram editor built with Rust and WebAssembly
author: Anomaly

scripts.build: npm run build:wasm && npm run build:web
scripts.netlify:build: curl https://rustwasm.github.io/wasm-pack/installer/init.sh -sSf | sh && npm ci && cd web && npm ci && cd .. && npm run build
scripts.check-size: size=$(stat -c%s web/pkg/ascii_canvas_bg.wasm); if [ $size -gt 1572864 ]; then echo "WASM size $size exceeds 1.5MB limit"; exit 1; else echo "WASM size $size is within budget"; fi
